text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the Oka Sho to the Japanese Derby...
Vodka continues to ponder over whether or not
she should take on this unprecedented challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka asks Narita Brian for advice based on her
experience with the Derby, and gets told to
follow her gut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words make Vodka rethink everything, and
she realizes that it's her true nature to do what
she wants—no matter how reckless it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to stay true to herself, Vodka decides to
run in the Japanese Derby instead of the
Japanese Oaks.
